name: Customer Balance
query:
SELECT 
	party "Customer:Link/Customer",
	SUM(debit-credit)*-1 as "Customer Balance:Currency"
FROM
	`tabGL Entry`
WHERE
	account = %(account)s and
	is_cancelled IS NOT NULL
AND
	company = %(company)s
AND
	posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
GROUP BY
	party
HAVING
   SUM(debit-credit) !=0;

name: CB
query:
SELECT 
	party "Customer:Link/Customer",
	SUM(debit-credit)*-1 as "Customer Balance:Currency"
FROM
	`tabGL Entry`
WHERE
	is_cancelled IS NOT NULL and
	party_type = Customer
AND
	company = %(company)s
AND
	posting_date BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
GROUP BY
	party
HAVING
   SUM(debit-credit) !=0;

name: taxes report
Asset
query:
SELECT
    SS.company                  "Company:Data:200",
    SS.name                     "Asset Number:Link/Asset:200",
    SS.asset_name               "Asset Name:Data:200",
    SS.status                   "Status:Data:200",
    SS.location                 "Location:Data:200",
    SS.asset_category           "Asset Category:Link/Asset Category:200",
    SS.purchase_date            "Purchase Date:Date:150",
    SS.available_for_use_date   "Available For Use Date:Date:150",
    SS.gross_purchase_amount    "Gross Purchase:Currency:150",
    SS.opening_accumulated_depreciation  "Opening Accumulated Depreciation:Currency",
    (
        SELECT 
            SUM(DS.depreciation_amount)
        FROM
            `tabDepreciation Schedule` AS DS
        WHERE
            DS.journal_entry IS NOT NULL
        AND
            DS.schedule_date like CONCAT(%(physical_year)s ,'-%%-%%')
        AND
            DS.parent = SS.name
    )   "Depreciation Amount:Currency",
    MAX(DS.accumulated_depreciation_amount) "Closing Accumulated Depreciation:Currency:200",
    (SS.gross_purchase_amount - MAX(DS.accumulated_depreciation_amount)) "Net Book Value:Currency:200"
FROM
    `tabAsset` AS SS
JOIN 
    `tabDepreciation Schedule` AS DS
ON 
    SS.name = DS.parent
WHERE 
    SS.docstatus = 1
AND
    DS.journal_entry IS NOT NULL
AND
    SS.company = %(company)s
Group By
    SS.name;

name: Asset Category
query:
SELECT
    SS.company                  "Company:Data:200",
    SS.name                     "Asset Number:Link/Asset:200",
    SS.asset_name               "Asset Name:Data:200",
    SS.status                   "Status:Data:200",
    SS.location                 "Location:Data:200",
    SS.asset_category           "Asset Category:Link/Asset Category:200",
    SS.purchase_date            "Purchase Date:Date:150",
    SS.available_for_use_date   "Available For Use Date:Date:150",
    SUM(SS.gross_purchase_amount)    "Gross Purchase:Currency:150",
    SUM(SS.opening_accumulated_depreciation)  "Opening Accumulated Depreciation:Currency",
    SUM((
        SELECT 
            SUM(DS.depreciation_amount)
        FROM
            `tabDepreciation Schedule` AS DS
        WHERE
            DS.journal_entry IS NOT NULL
        AND
            DS.schedule_date like CONCAT(%(physical_year)s ,'-%%-%%')
        AND
            DS.parent = SS.name
    ))   "Depreciation Amount:Currency",
    MAX(DS.accumulated_depreciation_amount) "Closing Accumulated Depreciation:Currency:200",
    (SUM(SS.gross_purchase_amount) - MAX(DS.accumulated_depreciation_amount)) "Net Book Value:Currency:200"
FROM
    `tabAsset` AS SS
JOIN 
    `tabDepreciation Schedule` AS DS
ON 
    SS.name = DS.parent
WHERE 
    SS.docstatus = 1
AND
    DS.journal_entry IS NOT NULL
AND
    SS.company = %(company)s
Group By
    SS.asset_category;

name: Att Test
query:
select
    EC.name,
    EC.employee,
    EC.time,
    E.date_of_joining
from
    `tabEmployee Checkin` EC, `tabEmployee` E
where
    EC.employee = E.name and
    E.date_of_joining > EC.time

name: Bank Balance
query:
Select
	GLE.account									"Account:Link/Account:300"
,	sum(GLE.debit)									"Debit:Currency:150"
,	sum(GLE.credit)									"Credit:Currency:150"
,	(sum(GLE.debit)-sum(GLE.credit))						"Balance EGP:Currency:150"	

	

from

	`tabGL Entry` 	AS GLE
Join	`tabAccount`	AS ACC
On 	ACC.name = GLE.account

where
        GLE.account in ("1262211 - بنك قطر الوطنى90-203319088825-107 - ASR",
    "1262212 - بنك قطر الوطنى14-203319088818-107 - ASR",
    "1262221 - البنك المصرى الخليجى 001-608990-0048 - ASR",
    "1262222 - البنك المصرى الخليجى 008-608990-0048 - ASR",
    "1262231 - البنك التجارى الدولىCIB حـ‘/100050051778 - ASR",
    "1262241 - البنك الاهلى المصرى رقم 1163171466623403030حساب تمويل - ASR",
    "1262242 - البنك الآهلى المصرى رقم 1163171466623404044حساب تمويل - ASR",
    "126231 - بنك قطر الوطنى دولار29-USD20319481760 - ASR",
    "126232 - البنك المصرى الخليجى دولار-608990-0048 - ASR",
    "126241 - بنك قطر الوطنى15-203113711618-107يورو - ASR")
Group BY account
HAVING 	(sum(GLE.debit_in_account_currency)-sum(GLE.credit_in_account_currency)) <> 0 and 
	(sum(GLE.debit)-sum(GLE.credit)) <> 0
;

name: Cash Balance
query:
Select
	GLE.account									"Account:Link/Account:300"
,	sum(GLE.debit)									"Debit:Currency:150"
,	sum(GLE.credit)									"Credit:Currency:150"
,	(sum(GLE.debit)-sum(GLE.credit))						"Balance EGP:Currency:150"	

	

from

	`tabGL Entry` 	AS GLE
Join	`tabAccount`	AS ACC
On 	ACC.name = GLE.account

where
        GLE.account = "12611 - خزينة جنية مصرى - ASR"
Group BY account
HAVING 	(sum(GLE.debit_in_account_currency)-sum(GLE.credit_in_account_currency)) <> 0 and 
	(sum(GLE.debit)-sum(GLE.credit)) <> 0
;

name: Treasury checks
query:
Select
	GLE.account									"Account:Link/Account:300"
,	sum(GLE.debit)									"Debit:Currency:150"
,	sum(GLE.credit)									"Credit:Currency:150"
,	(sum(GLE.debit)-sum(GLE.credit))						"Balance EGP:Currency:150"	

	

from

	`tabGL Entry` 	AS GLE
Join	`tabAccount`	AS ACC
On 	ACC.name = GLE.account

where
        GLE.account = "123211 - أوراق قبض عقود-الخزينة - ASR"
Group BY account
HAVING 	(sum(GLE.debit_in_account_currency)-sum(GLE.credit_in_account_currency)) <> 0 and 
	(sum(GLE.debit)-sum(GLE.credit)) <> 0
;

name: B2B
Purchase Receipts
query:
SELECT 
    pi.posting_date AS "تاريخ الشراء",
    pi.supplier AS "المورد:Link/Supplier:200",
    pii.item_code AS "المنتج:Link/Item:200",
    pii.item_name AS "اسم المنتج",
    pii.qty AS "الكمية",
    pii.rate AS "السعر لكل وحدة",
    pii.amount AS "إجمالي السعر",
    COALESCE(SUM(b.actual_qty), 0) AS "المتبقي بالمخزن"  -- جمع الكمية من جميع المخازن
FROM 
    `tabPurchase Invoice` pi
JOIN 
    `tabPurchase Invoice Item` pii ON pi.name = pii.parent
LEFT JOIN 
    `tabBin` b ON pii.item_code = b.item_code
WHERE 
    pi.posting_date BETWEEN COALESCE(%(from_date)s, '2024-10-15') 
                        AND COALESCE(%(to_date)s, CURDATE())
GROUP BY 
    pi.posting_date, pi.supplier, pii.item_code, pii.item_name, pii.qty, pii.rate, pii.amount
ORDER BY 
    pi.posting_date DESC;

name: vR
Items List
query:
SELECT 
    @rownum := @rownum + 1 AS "مسلسل:Int:60",
    item.item_code AS "كود الصنف:Link/Item:150",
    item.item_name AS "اسم الصنف::200",
    item.item_group AS "مجموعة الصنف:Link/Item Group:150",
    item.stock_uom AS "الوحدة:Link/UOM:100",
    SUM(IFNULL(bin.actual_qty, 0)) AS "إجمالي الكمية:Float:120"
FROM 
    `tabItem` item
LEFT JOIN 
    `tabBin` bin ON bin.item_code = item.item_code,
    (SELECT @rownum := 0) r
WHERE 
    item.disabled = 0
GROUP BY 
    item.item_code, item.item_name, item.item_group, item.stock_uom
ORDER BY 
    item.item_group, item.item_code;

name: Withholding Tax
query:
SELECT
    pi.name AS "Invoice No:Link/Purchase Invoice:120",
    pi.posting_date AS "Posting Date:Date:100",
    pi.supplier AS "Supplier:Link/Supplier:200",
    s.tax_id AS "Tax ID::150",
    pi.base_net_total AS "Net Total (Before Tax):Currency:130",

    -- إجمالي ضريبة الإضافة
    SUM(CASE 
        WHEN ptc.charge_type = 'On Net Total' THEN ptc.tax_amount
        ELSE 0 END) AS "Add Tax Amount:Currency:120",

    -- إجمالي ضريبة الخصم
    SUM(CASE 
        WHEN ptc.charge_type = 'Deduction' THEN ptc.tax_amount
        ELSE 0 END) AS "Discount Tax Amount:Currency:130"

FROM
    `tabPurchase Invoice` pi
LEFT JOIN
    `tabSupplier` s ON pi.supplier = s.name
LEFT JOIN
    `tabPurchase Taxes and Charges` ptc ON ptc.parent = pi.name

WHERE
    pi.docstatus = 1
    AND YEAR(pi.posting_date) = 2025

GROUP BY
    pi.name, pi.posting_date, pi.supplier, s.tax_id, pi.base_net_total

ORDER BY
    pi.posting_date DESC

name: تقرير الوحدات السكنية
query:
SELECT
    c.customer_name AS "اسم العميل",
    SUM(cd.installments) AS "إجمالي الأقساط:Currency:150",
    SUM(cd.paid) AS "إجمالي المسدد:Currency:150",
    SUM(cd.remaining) AS "إجمالي المتبقي:Currency:150"
FROM
    `tabContract details` cd
JOIN
    `tabunit` u ON cd.parent = u.name
JOIN
    `tabCustomer` c ON u.customer_link = c.name
GROUP BY
    c.customer_name
ORDER BY
    c.customer_name;
